overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunny rural countryside with wooden fences, a windmill, and farmland. The character travels along dirt paths through a peaceful farming area with traditional wooden architecture and crop fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with stone walls approaching wooden gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall, approaching a large wooden gate structure

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
wooden wagon cart parked beside the path
large wooden archway gate with hanging thatch
dense forest of tall pine trees in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left and a wooden cart on the right, approaching a rustic wooden gate that marks the entrance to the farmland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path approaching wooden windmill

events.description: passes through the wooden gate from the enclosed stone wall path into open countryside
path curves slightly to the right as it approaches the windmill

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through open grassland, approaching a large wooden windmill in the distance

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with four blades and a ladder on the side
small rustic wooden hut with thatched roof
open grassy fields on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into open countryside, Geralt approaches a large wooden windmill. The stone walls give way to open grass fields, and a small wooden building appears on the right as the path curves toward the windmill.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced farmland path with wooden buildings and crop fields

events.description: passes the windmill and enters a fenced agricultural area with cultivated fields
path curves left around a wooden building and enters a fenced corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the windmill and navigates through a farming area with wooden fences and cultivated crop fields

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence lining the path
cultivated field with green crops growing in rows

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the windmill and enters a more enclosed farming area with wooden fences and crop fields. The path curves around a wooden building, transitioning from open grassland to a fenced corridor between cultivated fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow fenced path through cultivated farmland with hay fields

events.description: ground becomes muddy and wet as the path passes through a low-lying area

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the fenced path through crop fields, navigating slightly muddy terrain near wooden sheds

entered.detail: field of golden hay or wheat ready for harvest
wet muddy section of the path with puddles

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor of wooden fences with crop fields on both sides, Geralt passes hay fields and encounters a muddy section of path. The area feels more enclosed with dense vegetation and farming structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending hill path toward wooden buildings with windmill visible

events.description: windmill becomes visible again on the left as the path ascends the hill
path curves right while continuing to ascend toward hilltop buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks up a hill toward wooden buildings at the top, with the windmill visible again to the left

entered.detail: wooden structure with thatched roof atop the hill
the same wooden windmill now visible from the opposite side
low stone wall appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Ascending a hill path, Geralt leaves the muddy farmland behind as the windmill comes back into view on the left. The path curves toward wooden buildings at the hilltop, with a stone wall now appearing on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a narrow stone-walled lane into an open farming landscape. It begins with Geralt walking past a wooden cart and a stone wall, moving steadily toward a rustic wooden gate. As he passes through the gate, the environment opens up into wide grass fields, with the path curving toward a large wooden windmill and a small adjacent building. The scene then shifts from the open grassland into a more enclosed area as the camera follows the path around another wooden structure. Finally, the surroundings transform into a fenced corridor of cultivated crop fields, marking the transition from the open countryside to a structured farming zone.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an enclosed farming corridor that gradually opens up as it ascends toward a hilltop settlement. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow path flanked by wooden fences and dense crop fields, passing through patches of hay and a muddy section of the trail. As the terrain begins to rise, the camera leaves the muddy farmland behind and the view expands to reveal a windmill standing to the left. The path then curves upward, shifting from wooden boundaries to a stone wall on the right before finally approaching a cluster of wooden buildings at the summit.
